doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future), references non-existent guidance, and contradicts established EDPB doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent EDPB guidance from 2014, and contradicts established EDPB positions that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR regardless of key holder status.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (future), references non-existent guidance, and contradicts established EDPB doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR.
